name: Validate email lists weekly with Google Sheets, VerifiEmail and Gmail reports

parameters.subject: =📧 Email Hygiene Report - {{ $now.format("MMM DD, YYYY") }}

parameters.content:
## EMAIL LIST HYGIENE AUTOMATION

Automatically validates your email list **every Friday at 5 PM**.

✅ What it does:
- **Reads emails** from **Google Sheets**
- Validates each email (format, MX records, deliverability)
- Categorizes as **Valid**, **Invalid**, or **Risky**
- Updates sheet with **validation status** and **timestamp**
- Generates **health score** and **statistics**
- Sends **professional HTML report** via **email**

📈 Benefits:
- Improved **deliverability**(reduce 15%+ bounce rates to <2%)
- Better sender reputation with **ISPs**
- Higher campaign **ROI and engagement**
- **GDPR/CAN-SPAM compliance** ready

⏱️ Runs: **Every Friday at 5:00 PM**
📧 Processes: **Unlimited emails**(loops through all)

## SETUP REQUIRED (5 minutes)

Before activating this workflow:

1. **Google Sheets** Setup:
   Create sheet with these exact columns:
   • row_number (auto-generated by Sheets)
   • name
   • email
   • status **(leave blank - auto-filled)**
   • checked_at **(leave blank - auto-filled)**
   • notes **(leave blank - auto-filled)**

2. Credentials Needed:
   • Google Sheets OAuth2
   • Email validation API **(VerifiEmail)** at **https://verifi.email**
   • Gmail OAuth2 (for sending reports)

3. Configure Email Recipient:
   • Open **"Send Email Report"** node
   • Change **"sendTo"** from **"marketing.manager@company.com"**
   • Use: **your-email@company.com** or **team@company.com**
   • Optional: Add CC/BCC for multiple recipients

4. Test Before Activating:
   • Add **3-5 test emails** to your **sheet**
   • Click "Execute Workflow" button
   • Verify sheet updates correctly
   • Check **email report arrives**
   • Then toggle **"Active"** switch

## EMAIL VALIDATION PROCESS

Processes each email **individually** in a **loop**:

**STEP 1**: Loop starts
   → Takes one email from sheet

**STEP 2**: Validation checks
   ✓ Email format (RFC 5322 compliance)
   ✓ Domain has mail server (MX records)
   ✓ Mailbox exists (SMTP verification)
   ✓ Not disposable email service
   ✓ Not catch-all domain

**STEP 3**: Categorization
   ✅ VALID - Passes all checks, safe to use
   ❌ INVALID - Failed checks, remove from list
   ⚠️ RISKY - Disposable or catch-all, review

**STEP 4**: Update sheet
   • Writes status to row
   • Adds timestamp
   • Includes reason/notes

**STEP 5**: Loop continues
   → Processes next email
   → Repeats until all done

**Speed**: ~1-2 emails per second
Handles: **1000+ emails ** automatically

## TRUE/FALSE BRANCHING

**IF node splits workflow** based on **validation**:

✅ TRUE BRANCH (Valid Emails):
   Condition: validation.valid === true
   ↓
   Process Valid Email code:
   • Status: "valid"
   • Note: **"Email verified successfully"**
   • Check for disposable flag
   ↓
   Update Valid Status:
   • Updates Google Sheet row
   • Writes status, timestamp, notes
   ↓
   **Merge Input 1**:
   • Collects valid email data

❌ FALSE BRANCH **(Invalid Emails)**:
   Condition: validation.valid === false
   ↓
   Process Invalid Email code:
   • Status: "invalid"
   • Note: Specific reason (no MX, bad format, etc.)
   ↓
   Update Invalid Status:
   • Updates Google Sheet row
   • Writes status, timestamp, notes
   ↓
   **Merge Input 2**:
   • Collects invalid email data

🔗 Merge combines both branches → loops back

## MERGE & LOOP COMPLETION

The **Merge node** is critical for data flow:

**INPUT 1**: Valid emails from **TRUE** branch
**INPUT 2**: Invalid emails from **FALSE** branch

What Merge does:
- Combines both data streams
- Creates single unified output
- Feeds back to **Loop Over Items**
- Loop accumulates all processed emails internally

Loop Behavior:
- Continues processing next email
- Repeats **validation → branch → merge → loop**
- Tracks all items internally
- When complete, "done" output fires

**DONE** Output:
- Triggers only after ALL emails processed
- Sends accumulated data to Calculate Statistics
- Contains complete results from all iterations

This ensures every email is validated and collected
before generating the final report.

## ANALYTICS & REPORTING

After all emails processed:

1️⃣ **Calculate Statistics**:
   Receives all accumulated emails from loop
   
   **Calculates**:
   • **Total emails** processed
   • **Valid count** & **percentage** 
   • **Invalid count** & **percentage** 
   • **Risky count** & **percentage**
   
   **Health Score Formula** (0-100):
   = **(Valid% × 100) - (Invalid% × 20) - (Risky% × 10)**
   
   **Scoring**:
   • **80-100: Excellent ✅ (Green)**
   • **60-79: Good ⚠️ (Orange)**
   • **0-59: Needs Attention ❌ (Red)**
   
   **Creates**:
   • Summary text
   • Email lists by category
   • Invalid emails with reasons

2️⃣ **Send Email Report**:
   Beautiful **HTML email** with:
   • **Color-coded health score badge**
   • **4 stat cards (valid/invalid/risky/total)**
   • **Action items list**
   • **Invalid emails with detailed reasons**
   • **Direct link to Google Sheet**
   • Campaign impact insights
   • Professional branding

**Sent to**: Configurable recipients
📅 Frequency: **Every Friday at 5:00 PM**

## CUSTOMIZATION OPTIONS

Easy modifications:

⏰ Change Schedule:
   • **Edit "Weekly Schedule" node**
   • Current: 0 17 * * 5 (Friday 5PM)
   • Examples:
     - Daily 9AM: 0 9 * * *
     - Every Monday: 0 17 * * 1
     - First of month: 0 9 1 * *

📧 Multiple Recipients:
   • "Send Email Report" node → Add options

   • Comma-separate: email1@co.com,email2@co.com

📊 Add Slack Notifications:
   • Add Slack node after email
   • Channel: #marketing
   • Quick text summary for instant alerts

🗃️ Archive Invalid Emails:
   • Add Google Sheets node on FALSE branch
   • Operation: Append
   • Sheet: Create "Invalid_Archive" tab
   • Keeps historical record

📈 Export to CRM:
   • Add HTTP Request/Webhook node
   • Push validated emails to HubSpot/Salesforce
   • Keep CRM automatically synced

⚡ Rate Limiting (if needed):
   • Add "Wait" node after validation
   • Wait: 1-2 seconds
   • Prevents API throttling for large lists

🎨 Customize Email Design:
   • Edit HTML in "Send Email Report"
   • Change colors, fonts, branding
   • Add company logo

## TROUBLESHOOTING GUIDE

**Common issues & solutions**:

❌ "Column not found" error:
   **Fix**: Check **Google Sheet** has exact column names
   • Names are **case-sensitive**
   • Required: row_number, name, email, status, checked_at, notes

❌ **Loop processes only 1 email**:
   **Fix**: Check Google Sheets node returns multiple rows
   • Verify "Range" field is empty or set to A:F
   • Check "Use Header Row" is enabled

❌ **Statistics show wrong counts**:
   **Fix**: Enable "Execute Once" in Calculate Statistics
   • Click gear icon on node
   • Toggle "Execute Once" to ON
   • This processes all items together, not one-by-one

❌ **Email doesn't arrive**:
   **Fix**: Check several things
   • Gmail spam/promotions folder
   • Gmail credential is authorized
   • Recipient email is correct
   • Try different recipient to test

❌ **Validation API errors**:
   **Fix**: Verify API access
   • Check API key is valid
   • Verify quota not exceeded
   • Test with known email: test@gmail.com

❌ **Merge node shows "missing input"**:
   **Fix**: Both branches must connect to Merge
   • TRUE branch → Merge Input 1
   • FALSE branch → Merge Input 2
   • Both Update nodes must complete

💡 Debug Tips:
   • Click individual nodes → "Execute Node"
   • Check OUTPUT panel for each step
   • Use console.log() in code nodes
   • Test with 3-5 emails before full list
   • Check execution log (bottom panel) for errors
